sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95690" key="spaqi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπᾰθ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπάθη, σπαθίην κτένα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the broad ribs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:296" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.296</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
